blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,597 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 65".
